articleTitle: NocoDB 분석: Airtable 대체 도구로 쓸 수 있을까? 라이선스와 운영 리스크 검토
altKo: NocoDB를 Airtable 대체 데이터베이스와 라이선스 주의 관점에서 분석한 대표 이미지
captionKo: NocoDB는 업무 데이터베이스 자동화 후보지만, 라이선스와 운영 범위를 별도로 확인해야 한다.
style: database-license-comparison-board, Korean business editorial raster hero, dark navy charcoal, teal and orange accents, minimal text
promptKo: NocoDB를 Airtable 대체 데이터베이스 자동화 후보로 검토하는 프리미엄 Biz2Lab 기술 에디토리얼 커버 이미지. 데이터베이스 그리드, API 연결, 관리자 대시보드, 라이선스 확인 카드, 백업/권한 게이트가 한 화면 안에서 균형 있게 보이는 의사결정 지도 느낌.
providerPromptKo: Create a premium Biz2Lab Korean tech editorial hero image for an article titled "NocoDB 분석: Airtable 대체 도구로 쓸 수 있을까?" Show NocoDB as a database automation candidate that needs license and operations verification before adoption. Use a dark navy and charcoal background with teal and warm orange accents. Compose a 16:9 decision-map scene: a central abstract database table grid, connected API/workflow lines, a compact admin dashboard panel, a license verification card, a backup gate, and a permission model checkpoint. The tone should be balanced, careful, and professional, not hostile or sensational. Include minimal Korean text only if it can be rendered cleanly: "NocoDB 분석", "라이선스 확인", "데이터베이스 자동화", "운영 리스크 검토", "Biz2Lab Automation Series". No official NocoDB logo, no Airtable logo, no third-party logos, no real customer data, no fake screenshots, no placeholder elements, no claim that commercial use is guaranteed, and no "fully open source" claim.
negativePromptKo: official NocoDB logo, Airtable logo, third-party SaaS logo, real company logo, real customer data, private database rows, API keys, secrets, fake screenshot, stock photo, placeholder, watermark, sensational warning sign, hostile tone, distorted text, dense tiny text, unreadable Korean text, claim of guaranteed commercial use, claim of fully open source
visualReferenceStyle: Korean database automation editorial hero image, license decision map, polished SaaS operations visual, minimal text
composition: 16:9 wide editorial cover with central database grid, surrounding verification cards, API lines, backup gate, and permission checkpoint.
expectedOutput: Real Codex-generated PNG artifact saved outside the repo under the approved generated_images folder
textPolicy: minimal Korean text only; avoid dense text blocks
visualDifferentiationHint: NocoDB uses a database grid and permission/backup decision board rather than workflow-node-first composition.
